target:
I can't see the other form.
But it's not a situation where we can be optimistic.
We should hurry and descend the mountain.
Hunter, I'm sorry, but can you come down the mountain with me?
My younger brother has a serious injury, and I need some help.
I'll take you to the hospital right away, so just endure for a little while.
Take it slow. Here, use my shoulder.
…Okay. If it's too hard, just say so.
That… Hunter, is that okay? Thank you for helping…

Nezu.
Thanks can come later.
Just worry about your own body now.
So, was the monk attacked by the monster from before or someone else?
That guy in the red kimono.
(The teacher is still confused about Ryunosuke's situation)
I… I just want to rest here a bit longer.
What an idiotic thing to say!
Here, stand up. I'll carry you.

No, I'm fine…
I really am okay…
That's such a strong pain. Let me see your body.
It's too loose for stopping the bleeding. Do it again.
Watch out for any strange things again.
Endure. If you don't tighten it tightly, it won't stop the bleeding.
(The teacher has been thinking about something since earlier)
Either way is fine. I'll sort things out now, so if you're there, listen.
I want to take Ryunosuke to town safely and quickly.
Anything is fine! If it's something that helps my brother, please tell me anything!
"I'll support as much as I can."
Don't you know… including Ryunosuke's future condition?
I'll support as much as I can. That's all I can say now.
It's still just 'as much as possible'?
If we escape to town… to the hospital, the others won't chase us anymore.
If we safely escape to the hospital… will Ryunosuke be saved?
Thank you. I feel like I understand a bit now.
You… no, you two have information you can answer and information you can't.
You two, right? Most of the voices I hear are male, but sometimes there's a female voice mixed in.
You're always by our side, but for some reason, you can't be seen.
But you're watching us and delivering information through your voices, right?
The clue that made me realize this was about Heine.
Ryunosuke and I received your warnings and managed to escape.
Heine ended up like that… I couldn't have predicted it.
And you two know about me and Ryunosuke… no, not just that.
It seems you didn't not know about the hunter named Nezu.
But you're not gods. There are things you know and can tell, and things you can't.
If you think about it, the intention and timing of your warning that we would be killed makes sense.
…First, there's a future where Ryunosuke is killed. You came from there. Isn't that right?
And you interfered with the past with just your voices to avoid that future--
In the end, we survived that situation.
But from here on, it's events that didn't exist in the past.
You probably can't predict what's ahead, and you're starting to feel the limits of supporting with just your voices, right?
Incredible… from this time, you're already like the current Hizuru.
I'm grateful that my brother didn't die in that situation. Thank you…
But no one knows what impact the interference with the past will have on the future. There could be good things too--
(He's very weak! Will we make it to the hospital from here!?)

I want to say sorry to my big sis…
There's something I need to apologize for.
What is it… at a time like this.

When I heard you'd made friends…
I teased you… Sorry about that.

Also… the novel's notes…
I looked through them without permission… Sorry.
Then… last week… I borrowed the dictionary without permission… sorry.

It's fine now.
Just let it be already…
If you're so full of energy, then let's hurry up.

Wait… Just a second…
There's still something important… I haven't said it yet.

That's right.
Thank you.
But if that's the case…

He's just fainted.
But if we leave him like this…

I don't want to…
I definitely don't want that.

Then we'll do what we can.
I'll carry this monk.
We need to hurry to the hospital.

Birthday…
I won't let it become my brother's death day.

The teacher hasn't given up yet.
Of course I haven't either!
Ushio, go ahead and check if the route to the hospital is safe!
